AI Chief Of Staff

Deck is an always-on AI assistant with its own email inbox. CC it on any thread or hand it a task, and it takes over. It learns your preferences and priorities over time, proactively flags what needs your attention, and can run on a schedule to deliver briefings and status updates automatically. It's built to take ambiguous, multi-step tasks head on, so you can move on with your day.

Promoted

Stasia

📌 [...] Hey all, I'm Stasia, founder of Deck. Deck is an AI teammate for busy operators, professionals, and teams. You can email it, use it in the app, sign it up for services you use, email alerts/newsletters, or set it up to run recurring work. It can read project files, summarize messy context, generate or edit decks/memos/sheets, answer questions over your knowledge base, and proactively surface things that need attention. Importantly, it doesn't require blanket inbox authorization to be effective and only emails you. We made email a first-class interface because delegation already happens there and it's a decades old, hardened protocol. People forward a thread, CC someone, attach files, subscribe it to email alerts and newsletters and ask for help. We believe Deck fits that behavior instead

results.title: Superhuman Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
Report

 109 views

EcoSend

EcoSend

•4 reviews

Superhuman are absolute rockstars when it comes to implementing every feature. So much thought goes behind each and every improvement, and they somehow never make the product feel more bloated, and absolutely NEVER slow the experience down. Superhuman AI is no different, in fact, it's a perfect example of them making things \faster\. I must admit, it took some getting used to, having an AI assistant in my inbox with me. But more and more I am finding myself using it to get back to emails — especially the ones I know I should have replied to yesterday. It really helps kick off a draft and eliminate the "blank canvas" issue I often face. Keep it up, Superhuman team! Always an inspiration! ❤️

Report

 26 views

Hudson Labs [...] Report

 26 views

Hudson Labs

used Superhuman to build Hudson Labs

•5 reviews

Superhuman has nailed AI integration into email. I love that I don't have to create meeting invites anymore. Superhuman's killing it with decent meeting names, zoom link included, correct attendees, correct duration etc. I also love the auto-drafted emails and auto-reminders. They're simple things that make a big difference.

Report

 20 views

•2 reviews

#### What's great

As someone doing GTM work, I basically live in my inbox. Outreach, partnership follow-ups, launch coordination — it never stops. [...] Report

 14 views

•1 review

Use it daily. Haven't finished a single day with an email lingering in my inbox since Superhuman. Key features: 1. Snippets: I use this to brilliantly add reusable bits of information in emails. eg: zoom, calendar link, etc. 2. Ai: I have Superhuman initially compose an email for me. I can even have it 'rewrite in my voice' so I don't sound like a robot. 3. Remind me if no reply: There's always those emails that someone else needs to follow up with, but I will need to follow up with if they drop the ball. 'remind me if no reply' fixes that. Plenty of other features, but the slick UI, the use of shortcuts, and the fact that it just works, stands out.

Report
